function solve(s) {

    const n = s.length;

    // Compute prefix_L and prefix_C

    const prefix_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const prefix_C = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i + 1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_C[i + 1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] === 'C' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute suffix_T

    const suffix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i + 1] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute original count

    let original_count = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            original_count += prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i];

        }

    }

    // Compute add_L array

    const add_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    let current_sum = 0;

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            current_sum += suffix_T[i];

        }

        add_L[i] = current_sum;

    }

    add_L[n] = 0;

    // Compute add_C array

    const add_C = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        add_C[i] = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i];

    }

    // Compute add_T array

    const add_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        add_T[i] = prefix_C[i];

    }

    // Find maximum added

    const max_add_L = Math.max(...add_L);

    const max_add_C = Math.max(...add_C);

    const max_add_T = Math.max(...add_T);

    const max_added = Math.max(max_add_L, max_add_C, max_add_T);

    return original_count + max_added;

function solve(s) {

    const n = s.length;

    // Compute prefix_L and prefix_C

    const prefix_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    const prefix_C = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i + 1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

        prefix_C[i + 1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] === 'C' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute suffix_T

    const suffix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i + 1] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute original count

    let original_count = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            original_count += prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i];

        }

    }

    // Compute add_L array

    const add_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    let current_sum = 0;

    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            current_sum += suffix_T[i];

        }

        add_L[i] = current_sum;

    }

    add_L[n] = 0;

    // Compute add_C array

    const add_C = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        add_C[i] = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i];

    }

    // Compute add_T array

    const add_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        add_T[i] = prefix_C[i];

    }

    // Find maximum added

    const max_add_L = Math.max(...add_L);

    const max_add_C = Math.max(...add_C);

    const max_add_T = Math.max(...add_T);

    const max_added = Math.max(max_add_L, max_add_C, max_add_T);

    return original_count + max_added;

}
